title: castilleja cervina
intro: Castilleja cervina, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. Native to the western United States and Canada, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Traditionally, the roots and leaves of Castilleja cervina can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
